review_title: With Vanish Virus my equipment is protected at a low cost and with a high quality product.
description: Thanks to Virus Vanish, the useful life of my computer equipment has been extended. Unfortunately before using this software I lost several jobs and files, as well as computer equipment that was damaged by the large amount of malware, viruses and Trojans scattered on the network. This software has given me security and has reduced my expenses in the purchase of new equipment taking advantage of existing ones.
author: Wilmer P.
pros: The best of Virus Vanish is that it is a very simple software to install because the same program guides me at all times without having to review uncomfortable tutorials or manuals. Similarly, the possibility of scanning my equipment in a programmed manner is very helpful, because if I forget to do it manually, I can be certain that Virus Vanish will do it for me.
cons: Vanish virus, despite being a great product, does not escape a failure that affects most anti-virus and is the detection of false positives. Occasionally while working I receive alerts for threats that are not such. Sometimes I have had to disable important applications in my computers that when analyzed by this software throw problems, when they are totally clean.
